message:
sync Cargo.lock to reflect fp-groupby and rusqlite additions in fp-conformance

Cargo.lock was out-of-date relative to its workspace Cargo.toml files,
which already declare both new dependencies. The lockfile entry for
the `fp-conformance` package gains two new lines under its
`dependencies = [...]` block:

  fp-conformance:
  - fp-groupby   (declared in `crates/fp-conformance/Cargo.toml:23`)
  - rusqlite     (declared in `crates/fp-conformance/Cargo.toml:32`,
                  inherited from the workspace alias on
                  `Cargo.toml:41` — `rusqlite = { version = "0.39.0",
                  features = ["bundled"] }`)

`fp-groupby` is the local path crate at `crates/fp-groupby` (added to
the workspace at `Cargo.toml:9`). `rusqlite` is an external
dependency consumed via the workspace alias and marked
`workspace = true` in the conformance crate; the conformance crate
references it directly via `fuzz_read_sql_bytes` (pub fn, br-gpxk).

No source files in this commit — only the lockfile is brought up to
date so subsequent builds and `cargo metadata` calls in this tree
agree on the resolved dependency graph.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
